eyebrow.es: Breakout de ciudadanía digital · Grado K
eyebrow.vi: Breakout công dân số · Lớp K
eyebrow.ur: ڈیجیٹل شہریت بریک آؤٹ · جماعت K
eyebrow.zh: 数字公民破解 · 幼儿园

chrome.sub: Help our online buddies be kind. Solve four locks. Use the picture clues to help you.
chrome.briefP: Words on a screen can make a friend smile or feel sad. A Kindness Buddy uses kind words, lets everyone play, and thinks first. Look at the clues. Then open all four locks. Each lock tells you why the kind way is the best way.
chrome.footerText: Digital Citizenship Breakouts · Runs entirely in your browser — no logins, no data collected.
chrome.winP: You know kind words. You let friends play. You think before you send. You are a real Kindness Buddy!

clues.title: Use kind words
clues.body: Kind words feel warm. 'Good job!' is kind. 'Nice try!' is kind. Mean words hurt. Pick kind words.

clues.title: Everyone can play
clues.body: It is sad to be left out. Ask a new friend to play. Say 'Come play with me!' That is kind.

clues.title: Think, then send
clues.body: Stop. Look at your words. Are they kind? If yes, you can send. If not, do not send.

clues.title: Words can hurt
clues.body: You cannot see a face in a chat. A word can feel mean. Check that it sounds kind first.

clues.title: Help a sad friend
clues.body: See a sad friend? Say something nice. 'You are my friend.' That helps them feel better.

clues.title: Our class hamster
clues.body: Our class has a hamster named Nibbles. Nibbles runs on a wheel all day. This is fun, but it will not open a lock.

locks.title: The Kind Message
locks.q: Which one is the kind thing to say?
options: You are bad at this. Ha ha!
Good job! Want to play with me?
locks.reason: Kind words make a friend smile and feel safe. 'Good job! Want to play with me?' cheers a friend and asks them to play, so it is the kind pick.

locks.title: Kind or Not Kind?
locks.q: Tap EVERY kind thing to do online.

items.t: Ask a new friend to play
Laugh at a friend to be mean
Call a friend a mean name

locks.reason: Kind things help friends feel good — a cheer, an invite, a nice word. Laughing to be mean or calling names hurts, so we do not tap those.

locks.title: The Kind Word
locks.q: A warm word that helps a friend feel happy is a ______ word.
locks.reason: A kind word makes a friend smile and feel welcome. Using kind words is the best way to be a good buddy online.

locks.title: Think Before You Send
locks.q: Tap the steps in the RIGHT order before you send.
locks.reason: First STOP. Then ask if it is KIND. Only then SEND. Stop, kind, send keeps friends happy.
